description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a prominent asymmetrical sloped roof and a mix of green and gray exterior wall finishes. The front facade includes a covered porch area supported by multiple columns, with a wraparound deck and railings that extend partially along the sides. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and visual interest, while the rear and side elevations show a combination of solid wall sections and smaller window openings. The structure is elevated on stilts or piers, suggesting adaptation for uneven terrain or flood-prone areas. The roof is finished with dark shingles, and the entryway is accessible via a set of stairs leading up to the porch. The overall form is compact yet visually dynamic, blending contemporary and functional elements.
description: A modern bungalow with an asymmetrical sloped roof, green and gray exterior, wraparound porch, and elevated on piers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and prominent sloped roof with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green wall section, supporting columns, and partial deck extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid gray wall, smaller windows, and the continuation of the sloped roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible stairs, green wall, and supporting piers beneath the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
